creator: weberbug@gmx.de
text:
FreeBSD-14.1-BETA1-arm64-aarch64-RPI.img.xz does not boot on Raspberry Pi Zero 2, systems shows the rainbow screen.

This is easily fixed by copying bcm2710-rpi-2-b.dtb to bcm2710-rpi-zero-2.dtb

But this fix should not be necessary, the dtb for zero 2 should already be in the downloaded image.

see
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=261147
